Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Murray and Manuel Martinez appearing for moving party. George Wolff appearing for and with respondent Mr. Rossovich. Oral argument presented by both sides. Court made a ruling back in December 2005. It was reversed because of notice problems. Court has not changed his mind in granting this petition. Mr. Wolff requestes for Statement of Decision. Court wants each side to prepare Proposed Statement of Decision. Order Transferring Title to Real Property signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
